headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Fall As Inflation Concerns And VIX Spike
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Jun, 11 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts down about 0.8% and Nasdaq 100 futures off roughly 1.1%, as investors focus on fresh signals about inflation and interest rates. The key driver is the May consumer price report, where overall US CPI is expected at 4.2% year on year and core inflation near 2.9%, which means the cost of living is still rising faster than the Federal Reserve’s 2%...

headline: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Is Down 38.3% After Massive US$7 Billion Equity and Preferred Offering
